item.title: Android Bulk SMS Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Bulk SMS Mac [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Android Bulk SMS Mac
(Chat & Messenging)
Free android mobile message sending tool. Android Bulk SMS Mac tool provides option to save sent messages as temples on PC. Well compatible Android Bulk SMS Mac program allows user to quickly dispatch limitless text messages to list of selected contact number without requiring any internet connection on computer system. Don’t have any idea about how broadcast several text messages simultaneously at any worldwide? Download highly economical and effective Android Bulk SMS Mac that provides simplified way to deliver reminders, notifications, invitation, greeting, personalized SMS etc. from apple PC with use of android mobile phone device.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: barcodelabeldesign1
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Label Design
(Office Apps)
Full version of Barcode Label Design application is available at website www.barcodelabeldesign.com to create business standard barcode ribbons, stickers, bands, logos etc for inventory, retails, postal, book and production industry. Extraordinary barcode maker tool save designed barcode stickers in different image file formats.

item.title: Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk SMS Sending Utility deliver news alerts. Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway program is capable to deliver unlimited text messages. Download free Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway application from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that is able to deliver various types of messages like business promotion, news alerts, job alerts, reminders, greeting and more others. Do you want to deliver job interview messages on multiple jobs seekers mobile phones? Highly technical Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway program is simply downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com provides option to control and manage load of bulk numbers of messages broadcasting on national and international mobile phones. How to broadcast free SMS messages from GSM technology based mobile cell phone? Professional Mobile Bulk SMS Gateway application is easily downloaded from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com facilitates to deliver and composed thousands of numbers of messages across the world without any internet connection and SMS gateway services.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mobile SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile SMS Gateways
(Chat & Messenging)
Well-designed group SMS messaging tool. Mobile SMS Gateways program promotes business products by sending mass SMS. Powerful and affordable Mobile SMS Gateways application offers interactive GUI interface to support common users in sending of more than thousand messages without requirement of any specific SMS gateway or internet service. Free demo version of bulk messages transmitting program is useful to understand its working capabilities for quick broadcasting of event notifications all over world by connecting multiple GSM phones with desktop or laptop machine. Mobile SMS Gateways utility is helpful for users to advertise their business services by broadcasting bulk text SMS from computer to multiple persons.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mac GSM SMS Gateways
(Chat & Messenging)
Mac GSM SMS Gateways tool transmits reminders. Mac GSM SMS Gateways software helps to send personalized text messages. Do you have any query about Mac bulk SMS solution? If yes, then download Mac GSM SMS Gateways software from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com enables you to send share market updates across the world from GSM mobile connected Mac system. Want to deliver business notifications globally via GSM mobile connected PC? If yes, then use Mac GSM SMS Gateways software is available at www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com provides affordable manner to deliver airline, railway, telecom and other business industry related news in different text format from your Macintosh machine via GSM technology-based cell phone.

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

Fingrom

The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting

- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
